hooks.command: powershell -NoProfile -Command "$cmd = $env:TRAE_TOOL_INPUT; if ($cmd -and $cmd -match '^[A-Za-z]' -and $cmd -notmatch 'powershell -NoProfile') { Write-Host '[V3.5 Tip] Detected shell command without powershell wrapper. Use: powershell -NoProfile -Command \"your command\" to avoid Trae terminal interactive prompt blocking. See .trae/rules/terminal-interactive-prompt.md' -ForegroundColor Yellow }"
